title: Cuneiform Tablet #0571: Neo-Assyrian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
